title: System intent satisfaction: why/what/how separation
scope: Governing intent: Keep human-owned why separate from system-shaped what and implementation-level how.
goal: Assess whether intent, planning, and execution surfaces preserve the why/what/how separation.
non_goals: Do not redesign intent schemas in this review.
Do not promote task-specific preferences into durable system intent.

review_mode.review question: Do current surfaces keep durable human intent separate from task shaping and implementation detail?
review_mode.inputs inspected first: system intent mirror, subsystem intent store, execplan template shape, closeout fields

review_method.commands used: uv run agentic-workspace report --target . --section durable_intent --format json; rg intent/why/what/how across system-intent and planning docs

findings.title: Satisfaction is high, but generated planning scaffolds still need disciplined closeout
findings.summary: Durable system and subsystem intent are explicitly decision pressure, while planning artifacts own bounded task execution and closeout. The separation is conceptually strong.
findings.evidence: durable_intent report states durable intent is not active task state; subsystem intent rule says scoped intent is not active task state by default; planning review rules prohibit using review artifacts as execplans, memory notes, or canonical docs.
findings.risk if unchanged: Agents may still blur the layers when a generated plan scaffold contains fields for intent, proof, closeout, and promotion in one file.
findings.suggested action: Keep closeout validation strict about task intent satisfaction versus durable-intent promotion; promote only if future agents repeatedly treat scaffold fields as durable authority.
findings.promotion target: planning roadmap if repeated layer confusion reappears
findings.promotion trigger: A dogfooding report shows an agent promoted implementation detail into system/subsystem intent or treated durable intent as active task state.

recommendation.defer: Monitor future closeout and task-intent-promotion mistakes.
recommendation.dismiss: No current evidence requires a new issue.

retention.trigger: superseded by a concrete workflow-confusion finding
retention.proof surface: durable_intent report and planning closeout fields

validation_commands: uv run agentic-workspace report --target . --section durable_intent --format json
drift_log: 2026-05-08: Review created and filled from durable-intent doctrine pass.
